description: AXI4 Master connected to an AXI4 Repeater Pipeline connected to an AXI4 Slave. All modules are instantiated inside the tb_top testbench. CLK connects at the bottom face of each instance cube; RST_N connects at the top face.

testbench.description: Top-level testbench. Declares clk and rst_n and drives them to all DUT instances.

global_signals.name: clk
global_signals.description: System clock. Connects to the BOTTOM port of every instance cube.

global_signals.name: rst_n
global_signals.description: Active-low synchronous reset. Connects to the TOP port of every instance cube.

connections.description: System clock from testbench to all instances (enters at BOTTOM of each cube)
Active-low reset from testbench to all instances (enters at TOP of each cube)
